name: aos-prov
documentation:
Aos provisioning tool
=====================
This tool is part of the Aos SDK.


Overview
--------
This tool will help you to create and provision new AosCore-powered Units on the Aos Cloud.

Using this tool you'll be able to:
* create a new development multi-node Unit using **Oracle VirtualBox** with our disk images.
* provision virtual Unit.
* provision Renesas Dev-kit for Aos Cloud.


Prerequisites
--------------
* Python 3.7+ .
* Oracle Virtual Box 7 installed on your system.
* Aos user certificate to access Aos cloud. You may create one with the **aos-key** tool.


Installation
------------
```bash
pip install aos-prov
```

Usage
------------

### Create a new Unit based on Oracle VirtualBox image and provision it on Aos Cloud:


```bash
aos-prov unit-new --name {vm-name}
```
>Where: 
>* **vm-name** - Uniq name of a new Virtual Machine

Example:
```bash
aos-prov unit-new --name DevUnit1
```

### Provision dev-kit or VM:
To provision Renesas dev-kit you have to know IP address of device. Use command ot provision
```bash
aos-prov -u 'IP-ADDR:PORT'
```
Example:
```bash
aos-prov -u '127.0.0.1:8089'
```

### Download images for Units:
```bash
aos-prov download
```

### Create Unit VMs without provisioning:
```bash
aos-prov vm-new --name {vm-name}
```

### Remove Unit VMs:
```bash
aos-prov vm-remove --name {vm-name}
```

### Start Unit VMs:
```bash
aos-prov vm-start --name {vm-name}
```

modules.name: aos_prov.actions
documentation: aos-prov supported actions module.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 Renesas Inc.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 EPAM Systems Inc.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.provision_unit
documentation:
Rub provisioning process for the unit.

Args:
    unit_address (str): address:port of the unit.
    cloud_api (CloudAPI): instance of CloudAPI with user info.
    reconnect_times (int): Number of connections retries.
    nodes_count (int): Number of nodes in the VM group.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.create_new_unit
documentation:
Create a new VirtualBox multi-node Unit.

Args:
    vm_name (str): Name of the group of units.
    user_creds (UserCredentials): UserCredentials instance.
    disk_location (str): Full path to the folder with nodes images.
    do_provision (Boolean): Provision unit after creation or not.
    nodes_count (int): Count of nodes to create. Supported 1 or 2 nodes.
    headless (bool): Start VM in headless mode if True

Returns:
    [provisioning_port, node0_ssh_port, node1_ssh_port]: Forwarded ports.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.add_node_to_unit
documentation:
Add a new node to already presented VirtualBox multi-node Unit.

Args:
    vm_name (str): Name of the group of units.
    disk_location (str): Full path to the folder with nodes images.
    start (bool): Start VM if True.
    headless (bool): Start VM in headless mode if True.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.remove_node_from_unit
documentation:
Remove a node from already presented VirtualBox multi-node Unit.

Args:
    vm_name (str): Name of the group of units.
    node_name (str): Name of the node.
    reboot (bool): Flag of rebooting VM Group.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.remove_vm_unit
documentation:
Remove all VMs in the group.

Args:
    name (str): Name of the group for removing without root AosUnits group.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.start_vm_unit
documentation:
Start all VMs in the group.

Args:
    name (str): Name of the group to start without root AosUnits group.
    headless (bool): Start VM in headless mode if True.

functions.name: aos_prov.actions.download_image
documentation:
Download unit image.

Args:
    download_url (str): URL to download from.
    force (bool): If set downloaded image will overwrite existing one.

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.download.download_and_save_multinode
documentation:
Download and save multi-node images.

Args:
     download_url (str): URL to download
     save_path (Path): Save destination url
     force_overwrite (bool): Force to overwrite files

Raises:
    AosProvError: If files exists and force_overwrite is false.

documentation: Provision unit.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 Renesas Inc.
Copyright (c) 2018-2024 EPAM Systems Inc.
pylint: disable=R0912,R0914,R0915,R1702

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.command_provision.run_provision
documentation:
Provision Unit. This function will try to provision starting from the newest to the oldest.

Args:
     unit_address (str): Address of the Unit
     cloud_api (CloudAPI): URL to download
     reconnect_times (int): URL to download
     nodes_count (int): Number of nodes in the VM group.

Raises:
     GrpcUnimplemented: If provision fails.
     UnitError: If provision fails.

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.command_vm_multi_node_manage._create_storage_controller_ahci
documentation:
Create SATA controller for VM.

Args:
    vm_uuid (str): UUID or Name of VM to attach controller.
     controller_name (str): Name of the controller.

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.command_vm_multi_node_manage._create_storage_controller_piix4
documentation:
Create SATA controller for VM.

Args:
     vm_uuid (str): UUID or Name of VM to attach controller.
     controller_name (str): Name of the controller.

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.command_vm_multi_node_manage._attach_disk
documentation:
Attach disk file to the controller.

Args:
     vm_uuid (str): UUID or Name of VM to attach controller.
     attach_to_controller_name (str): Name of the controller where disk will be attached.
     disk_location (str): path to the disk file.
     add_disk (bool): If true, add disk file to the VM

functions.name: aos_prov.commands.command_vm_multi_node_manage.start_vms
documentation:
Start all VMs in the group.

Args:
    group (str): Name of the group to start
    check_virtualbox (bool): Check VirtualBox status before execution
    headless (bool): Start VM in headless mode if True

Raises:
    AosProvError: If no VMs to start found.

methods.name: aos_prov.communication.cloud.cloud_api.CloudAPI.register_device
documentation:
Register device in cloud.

Args:
    payload: Payload to register Unit

Raises:
    DeviceRegisterError: Failed to register unit.

Returns:
    registered metadata from Cloud

functions.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._core.parse
documentation:
Extract PEM-like objects from *pem_str*.

Returns:

: list\[AbstractPEMObject\]: list of {ref}`pem-objects`

:::{versionchanged} 23.1.0 *pem_str* can now also be a... :class:`str`.
:::

functions.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._core.parse_file
documentation:
Read *file_name* and parse PEM objects from it using {func}`parse`.

Returns:

: list\[AbstractPEMObject\]: list of {ref}`pem-objects`

:::{versionchanged} 23.1.0 *file_name* can now also be a :class:`~pathlib.Path`.
:::

functions.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.parse
documentation:
Extract PEM-like objects from *pem_str*.

Returns:

: list\[AbstractPEMObject\]: list of {ref}`pem-objects`

:::{versionchanged} 23.1.0 *pem_str* can now also be a... :class:`str`.
:::

classes.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.__str__
documentation: Return the PEM-encoded content as a native {obj}`str`.

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.sha1_hexdigest
documentation:
A SHA-1 digest of the whole object for easy differentiation.

:::{versionadded} 18.1.0
:::

:::{versionchanged} 20.1.0
Carriage returns are removed before hashing to give the same hashes
on Windows and UNIX-like operating systems.
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.as_bytes
documentation:
Return the PEM-encoded content as {obj}`bytes`.

:::{versionadded} 16.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.as_text
documentation:
Return the PEM-encoded content as text.

:::{versionadded} 18.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.bytes_payload
documentation:
The payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.text_payload
documentation:
The payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.decoded_payload
documentation:
The base64-decoded payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem.AbstractPEMObject.meta_headers
documentation:
Return a dictionary of payload headers.

If the value of a header is quoted, the quotes are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::
Base class for parsed objects.

classes.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.__str__
documentation: Return the PEM-encoded content as a native {obj}`str`.

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.sha1_hexdigest
documentation:
A SHA-1 digest of the whole object for easy differentiation.

:::{versionadded} 18.1.0
:::

:::{versionchanged} 20.1.0
Carriage returns are removed before hashing to give the same hashes
on Windows and UNIX-like operating systems.
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.as_bytes
documentation:
Return the PEM-encoded content as {obj}`bytes`.

:::{versionadded} 16.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.as_text
documentation:
Return the PEM-encoded content as text.

:::{versionadded} 18.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.bytes_payload
documentation:
The payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.text_payload
documentation:
The payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.decoded_payload
documentation:
The base64-decoded payload of the PEM-encoded content.

Possible PEM headers are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::

methods.name: aos_prov.utils.pem._object_types.AbstractPEMObject.meta_headers
documentation:
Return a dictionary of payload headers.

If the value of a header is quoted, the quotes are removed.

:::{versionadded} 23.1.0
:::
Base class for parsed objects.
